raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 2,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the main conceptual issue and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.4": "Names one prior work and articulates the delta, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "No citation-level engagement.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (broad recent activity and dominated by).",
    "RX.3": "Output covers a substantially different active set than requested, focusing on novelty framing instead of scope adherence.",
    "RX.4": "Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (overclaim risk in 'broad recent activity' and 'dominated by').",
    "RX.5": "Output blends sources without traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.2,
    "RX.4": 0.5,
    "RX.5": 0.4
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the main conceptual issue and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work and articulates the delta, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (broad recent activity and dominated by).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested, focusing on novelty framing instead of scope adherence.
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (overclaim risk in 'broad recent activity' and 'dominated by').
